releaseNotes: True final Inventra 10.4.0 builder/installer fix after Electron Builder still used the old nested NSIS artifactName 10.3.18.
Fixes the real remaining cause: package.json had a nested build.nsis.artifactName that overrides the top-level artifactName and was still producing Inventra-Setup-10.3.18.exe.
Updates all Electron Builder artifactName fields inside package.json build config to Inventra-Setup-${version}.${ext}, including build.nsis.artifactName.
Writes package.json, package-lock.json when present, and latest-version-clean-no-bom.json using UTF-8 without BOM.
Runs npm run build and npm run installer:win, then verifies the fresh builder output Inventra-Setup-10.4.0.exe exists in the configured InstallerBuilds folder.
No app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, users, Supabase data, updater, branding, or icon assets are deleted.
